002 — ABOUT

The shot behind the scenes

I'm a second-year Integrated B.Tech Computer Science & Engineering student at Sanjivani University, currently holding a 7.68 CGPA. My focus is frontend and web development — I like the craft of turning an idea into something responsive, clean, and genuinely usable. I've also spent time exploring AI-assisted development workflows with tools like Claude, ChatGPT, and Lovable, and I'm always looking for ways to build faster without losing quality. When I'm not writing code, you'll usually find me behind a camera — videography and cinematography are the other lens through which I see the world.
